summary: All 6 phases completed successfully. The Make 24 brute-force solver passed all 4 test cases including the unsolvable [1,1,1,1] and the classic [3,3,8,8] fractional puzzle. A 6-slide dark-themed PowerPoint report and a narrated MP4 video (edge-tts en-US-GuyNeural audio + moviepy assembly at 24fps libx264/aac) were saved to both deliverables/ and Downloads/.
issues: ffmpeg not found on PATH — moviepy used its bundled imageio-ffmpeg encoder successfully
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY credit balance too low (400 error) — voiceover scripts were pre-written instead of LLM-generated; audio synthesis via edge-tts succeeded normally
Playwright file:// URL required Windows-native path format (C:\...) not MSYS /c/... style
